/usr/bin/c++   -std=c++11 -O0 -g -pipe -Wall -Werror -Wno-unused-variable -lrt -pthread -fno-strict-aliasing -Wno-error=shadow -Wno-sign-compare -g    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/test_log.dir/TestLog.cpp.o  -o test_log   -L/root/tmms/lib/jsoncpp/lib64  -L/root/tmms/lib/jsoncpp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/root/tmms/lib/jsoncpp/lib64:/root/tmms/lib/jsoncpp/lib libbase.a
